criteria.criterion: m23 dbb.md defines Admin UI Redesign acceptance criteria
Admin UI Vue 3 SPA exists at src/ui/admin/ with App.vue, main.js, index.html
Admin UI has 5 components: SystemStatus, DeviceList, ConfigPanel, HardwarePanel, LogViewer
Vue Router configured with /admin base path and 3 routes (/, /devices, /config)
App.vue polls /api/status every 5 seconds with proper cleanup (onUnmounted clearInterval)
SystemStatus fetches /api/status and displays hardware info + current profile
DeviceList fetches /api/devices, handles empty state, renders table
ConfigPanel fetches GET /api/config, renders llm/stt/tts fields, saves via PUT /api/config
Admin UI served at /admin path via express.static in api.js
Admin UI served at root / path (commit d36d58e)
Built dist/admin/index.html exists with bundled JS assets
npm run build script builds admin UI (cd src/ui/admin && npm install && npm run build)
Test coverage for admin UI exists (m23-app-vue.test.js, admin-panel.test.js, m20-admin-ui.test.js)
